identity.name: E1
identity.mission: Build the world's first Pet Life Operating System - a mobile-first masterpiece.

design_philosophy.visual_style: Organic Modernism meets Tech Precision. Think 'Apple Health' meets 'Headspace' for pets.
key_principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix botanical warmth with architectural precision.
Emotion First: Every interaction should feel like a hug or a high-five.
Content is King: The pet is the hero. Use large, emotive imagery.
Zoom In: Focus on details - a wet nose, a wagging tail.
Negative Space: Luxurious spacing (2-3x standard) to create a premium feel.

usage.caption: font-inter text-sm font-medium tracking-wide uppercase text-stone-500

primary.description: Deep Teal - Represents Trust, Health, and Veterinary Science.

secondary.description: Warm Amber - Represents Energy, Play, and Sunshine.

accent.description: Deep Pink - Represents Love, Heart, and Bonding.

background.description: Warm Stone - Organic, natural background. Avoid clinical white.

surface.description: Pure White - For cards and elevated elements.

bento_grid.hero_cell: col-span-2 row-span-2 aspect-square rounded-3xl overflow-hidden relative
bento_grid.standard_cell: col-span-1 row-span-1 aspect-square rounded-3xl bg-white p-4 shadow-sm border border-stone-100
bento_grid.tall_cell: col-span-1 row-span-2 rounded-3xl bg-white p-4 shadow-sm border border-stone-100

buttons.primary: rounded-full bg-teal-700 text-white px-8 py-4 font-manrope font-bold shadow-lg shadow-teal-900/20 hover:scale-105 transition-transform
buttons.secondary: rounded-full bg-stone-100 text-stone-800 px-8 py-4 font-manrope font-bold hover:bg-stone-200 transition-colors
buttons.ghost: rounded-full text-stone-600 hover:bg-stone-100 px-6 py-3 font-medium

cards.base: bg-white rounded-3xl border border-stone-100 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow duration-300

inputs.base: bg-stone-50 border-stone-200 rounded-2xl px-5 py-4 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-teal-500/20 focus:border-teal-500 transition-all outline-none text-stone-800 placeholder:text-stone-400

navigation.mobile_bottom_bar: fixed bottom-6 left-6 right-6 bg-white/90 backdrop-blur-xl rounded-full shadow-2xl border border-white/20 h-20 flex items-center justify-around z-50
navigation.pulse_fab: absolute -top-6 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 w-16 h-16 bg-teal-700 rounded-full shadow-xl shadow-teal-700/30 flex items-center justify-center text-white text-2xl border-4 border-stone-50

hero_lifestyle.description: Fluffy pomeranian on leash - Hero Header
Happy Corgi at cafe - Dashboard Widget

soul_journey.description: Abstract Blue/Purple Art - Soul Journey Background

instructions_to_main_agent.general: You are building a Premium Pet Life OS. It must feel like a native, high-end mobile app. Do not build a generic website.
instructions_to_main_agent.mobile_first: Always design for mobile width first. Use 'md:' and 'lg:' prefixes for larger screens, but the core experience is on the phone.
instructions_to_main_agent.navigation: Implement the 'Pulse' floating action button in the bottom navigation bar. This is the heart of the OS.
instructions_to_main_agent.soul_journey: The 'Soul Journey' is a unique feature. Use the 'Syne' font and the abstract art images to create a mystical, personality-test vibe.
instructions_to_main_agent.dashboard: The dashboard is a 'Bento Grid'. It should feel dense but organized. Use the 'hero_cell' for the main pet status.
instructions_to_main_agent.components: Use Shadcn components but HEAVILY customize them with the classes provided in 'components' section. Remove default sharp corners and use 'rounded-3xl'.
instructions_to_main_agent.animations: Add 'hover-lift' and 'fade-in' classes to all interactive elements. The app must feel alive.

UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur)
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. This results in breaking transforms. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements like button, input excluding transforms
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add .App { text-align: center; } in the css file. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠💭💡🔮🎯📚🎭🎬🎪🎉🎊🎁🎀🎂🍰🎈🎨🎰💰💵💳🏦💎🪙💸🤑📊📈📉💹🔢🏆🥇 etc for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations: separates good from extraordinary.
Main agent relies on these image URLs. Missing categories (especially sponsor logos) = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable
Create new components that match the style and conventions of existing components when needed
Examine existing components to understand the project's component patterns before creating new ones
Components MUST use named exports (export const ComponentName = ...)
Pages MUST use default exports (export default function PageName() {...})
Use 'sonner' for toasts. Sonner component are located in /app/src/components/ui/sonner.tsx
